title: scutellaria mollifolia
intro: Scutellaria mollifolia, also known as the alpine skullcap, is a perennial plant species in the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and surrounding areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria mollifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine formulations.
